# getUserVisibleURL(for:completionHandler:)

**Instance Method**

Returns the user-visible URL for an item.

## Declaration

```swift
func getUserVisibleURL(for itemIdentifier: NSFileProviderItemIdentifier, completionHandler: @escaping (URL?, (any Error)?) -> Void)
```

```swift
func getUserVisibleURL(for itemIdentifier: NSFileProviderItemIdentifier) async throws -> URL
```

## Parameters

- **itemIdentifier**: The item’s identifier.
- **completionHandler**: A block that the system calls after determining the item’s URL. The system passes the following parameters:



## Discussion



Calling this method marks the process so that accessing the URL won’t materialize the item. Instead, any attempt to read or write to an unmaterialized item fails with a [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Foundation/POSIXError/EDEADLK] POSIX error.

## Translating user-visible URLs

- **getIdentifierForUserVisibleFile(at:completionHandler:)**: Returns the identifier and domain for a user-visible URL.

items.description: Returns the identifier and domain for a user-visible URL.
items.name: getIdentifierForUserVisibleFile(at:completionHandler:)
